_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial Gene-Expression Profiling Unveils Immuno-oncogenic Programs of NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Progression.

_contextSnippet: with minimal effect on the viability of human wild-type and NF1 mutant Schwann cells...suggesting that BIRC5 inhibitors preferentially target MPNST cells
details: Minimal effect on viability when treated with BIRC5 inhibitors YM155 and LQZ-7I, suggesting BIRC5 inhibitors preferentially target MPNST cells
